---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Before filing: check ROADMAP.md and existing issues. If the idea is half-formed, start a Discussion instead.
-->

## Problem

<!--
What real-world pain point does this solve? One paragraph.
"It would be nice if…" is not a problem — name the observed failure mode.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should happen. Be concrete: command shape, output format, side effects. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why is the proposed solution better? -->

## Ecosystem fit

- Which plugin / sub-plugin does this belong to?
- Does this require a new named algorithm? If yes, propose the ID + name.
- Does this affect the shared conduct contract in `shared/conduct/`?
- Would this change the install footprint (new dependency)?

## Acceptance criteria

<!--
A checklist a reviewer can use to verify the feature is done.
Be specific enough that "it works on my machine" is not a valid close reason.
-->

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Additional context

<!-- Diagrams, prior art, related tools, references. -->
